name: Bamses Julerejse
overview: Three good friends, Bamse, Kylling, and Ælling, embark on an adventurous Christmas journey to Santa Claus's land. Along the way, they meet Santa's son, who wants to ruin Christmas at all costs. The series consists of 24 episodes about three friends who will do anything to deliver Santa's wrapping paper, gift ribbons, and his sack of To and From cards.

trailers.title: "Vi er på vej til dig, Julemand" | Bamses Julerejse | DR1
